name: ex-ditector-ct-log-exposure
title: Ex-Ditector AUX — Certificate-Transparency Exposure Self-Check (CT logs / crt.sh)
description: Auxiliary actor. Enumerates the hostnames a domain the SELF subject OWNS (or a genuine public_figure's public domain) has published to the PUBLIC Certificate Transparency logs (RFC 6962), read via the public crt.sh JSON index. It surfaces forgotten staging/dev/admin/vpn/internal hostnames and wildcard certs, flags sensitive labels with a cited OWASP-style reason, grades the exposure surface A-F, and emits typed module-events (record_type/event_type/source_module/domain/confidence/data) carrying a `domain` co-occurrence key for the SpiderFoot-style correlation engine. Scope-gated to self/public_figure ONLY via shared/scope.js (subdomain enumeration is a dual-use technique); the prohibited scopes are absent from the input enum. NO fake data: an empty CT response is reported as not_found and graded honestly; out-of-scope names returned by the index are dropped, never invented. No login walls, no captcha bypass, no private social graphs, no person-tracking, no romance/gender/intimacy inference; rate limits are honored (back off on 429).
